mapper.select: SELECT category_id, name, description, sort_order, status, create_time FROM category ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT category_id, name, description, sort_order, status, create_time FROM category WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status != 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, description, sort_order, status, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime})
